/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL: DEFENSE COUNSEL/ /INVOFF: SERGEANT O'BRIEN/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER ALI MISAGHL, SFPD/WIT SWORN DA: SERGEANT WILLIAMO'BRIEN, SFPD/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER LOIS HARNGREAVEN, SFPD/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1: OVER HEAD OF A GOOGLE MAP OF BAYSHORE AND HESTER/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2: PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING A MAN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 3: VIDEO/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4 - 6: STILL PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING A MINI VAN/X:THE PEOPLE WILL NOT PROCEED ON COUNTS 3, 4, 5 AND 7, AND THEY ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 1385,/ARG&SUB/HTA1:1 AND 2/CTORD: COUNT 6 CERTIFY/BAIL:250,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X: THE EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO THE PEOPLE,/
